reasoning: Anthropic faces stiff competition for the #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena Leaderboard by the end of 2025. OpenAI recently released GPT-5 in August 2025, which reportedly brings generational leaps in reasoning and coding performance. Historically, a new generation flagship from OpenAI holds the top spot for several months. Google is also rumored to be releasing Gemini 3.0 in December 2025. While Anthropic released its Claude 4 series in May 2025 and an update (Claude Haiku 4.5) in October 2025, it is less likely that a mid-cycle update like a potential Claude 4.5 Sonnet or Opus would completely dethrone a newly released GPT-5 by December 31. Therefore, the probability of Anthropic holding the absolute highest numeric Elo score on that specific date is relatively low, around 20%, despite the favorable tie-breaking rules.
